use_cases: Voice command input for accessibility features
Audio recording trigger for podcast or note-taking tools
Speech-enabled form input for healthcare documentation
ai_summary: A voice recording button component integrated with ElevenLabs API that enables voice input functionality. Built on Radix UI primitives with CVA for variant styling, it provides click-to-toggle recording behavior for converting speech to text or audio capture. Suitable for applications requiring hands-free input or voice-enabled workflows.
